content: We can reframe Self-Refine's single-chain iterative improvement framework by integrating multiple inconsistent self-perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective self-refine framework that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of no extra training or supervision while amplifying the quality of refinement. This hybrid approach works by having the LLM generate critical feedback on its own initial output from three distinct inconsistent problem-solving perspectives, then iteratively refine the output based on aggregated multi-perspective feedback.
